name: Spanish Onion Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: thinly slice the Spanish onions and grate the potatoes.
2. Prepare the Parmesan cheese.
3. Heat the olive oil in a heavy-based pan over medium heat.
4. Add the sliced onions to the pan and cook until they are tender, about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the water and red wine, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until the liquid has evaporated and the onions are dark-reddish brown.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the dried rosemary, grated potatoes, yogurt, flour, egg, and Parmesan cheese.
7. Add the cooked onions to the potato mixture and stir until combined.
8. Grease a 25cm ovenproof flan dish with olive oil, then pour in the potato mixture.
9. Bake at 200°C for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Sprinkle with chopped Italian parsley before serving.
